programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A man seeks to increase his intelligence and become a world-renowned scientist but his quest results in the deaths of other researchers

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy take on a grungy fisherman but when he isnt afraid to damage his own boat Froy is the one who is sinking fast

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Matt and Froy go missing Sonia is on a mission to figure out what theyve got up their sleeves

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: Bells of San Angelo

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Lambert has the stagecoach wrecked killing the Commissioner so his phony replacement can alter Coonskins land survey When Red Ryder exposes the survey hoax Lambert has his stooge Sheriff put Red in jail

programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gunsmoke S08E22 Shona
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S08E22 Shona

programme.title: Bonanza 308
programme.desc: Bonanza 308

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim and Arte must stop a deadly plot to kill a Hawaiian King on the high seas

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A known extortionist claims he is innocent of recent charges Gannon and Friday interrogate him about different incidents and then bring out a surprise device which proves his guilt

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: On an April 4 1968 Martin Luther King was assassinated in Memphis Tennesee With riots erupting all over the United States the Los Angeles Police Department braces for worse case scenarios such as rioting and bomb threats Friday and Gannon are assigned to the command post and monitor the situation from there and wait for the first sign of trouble However as the weekend progresses Friday notes that Los Angeles is quieter than normal and that many of the people are doing their best to remember that Dr King stood for peace

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While waiting to leave a small town in Montana Dr Kimble is spotted by the authorities and arrested He is cleared for having stolen a truck but the sheriff decides to jail him for having resisted arrest and suspects hes not who he says he is While Kimble is held in jail another prisoner determines his true identity

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike searches for a diver who has just stolen a briefcase filled with top secret papers

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: A geologist looking for uranium deposits in an underwater cave is trapped by a landslide

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Savage takes cover in a British mansion during an air raid but is trapped by a downed German colonel also taking cover there The cynical and manipulative female owner is unsympathetic to both

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time period Victoria Winters arrives in 1795 and sees the Old House looking bright and elegant

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time period Victoria awakes to the sight of straight-laced Abigail Collins

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: To apprehend a murderer who is supposedly killing in the name of God Nick must overcome his vampire fear of the cross

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki learns beauty is only skin deep after she falls for a mysterious movie star who relies on an antique makeup case

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Hanks twin brother arrives and Greta enlists him to help bump off her new husband Meanwhile Gretas sister and her husband drop in for a surprise visit

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Young woman Suzy looks out of the window of her apartment and witnesses a man murdering a woman in the apartment directly across from hers Suzy is so traumatized by what she sees that shes rendered mute Suzy is placed in the care of Dr Trask who alas turns out to be the man who committed the murder she witnessed

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A TV shock journalist gives an on-air tour of an eerie haunted house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Down on his luck yuppie Richard Shepard crashes at his buddy Carls swanky seaside abode after he gets thrown out of his home by his fed-up wife Eleanor Richard develops a strong bond with a mysterious large white dog who not only becomes his new best friend but also kills anyone who angers Richard

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Struggling writer Jeffrey Hunt fakes his own death in order to achieve literary immortality His unfaithful wife Debby has been having an adulterous affair with Jeffreys publicist and best friend Tony Lynch Debby and Tony try to make Jeffreys staged death real but the plan backfires

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is stranded by a thunderstorm in an isolated log lodge with six other people who are being killed off one by one

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol brings a French Poodle home from the pound and Mister Ed plans to get rid of Pierre as soon as possible

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur tries everything from hypnosis to psychiatry in order to cure Ed of his fear of heights

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan has a mission to move a mobile anti-aircraft artillery battery but Klinks new tough second-in-command is impeding the Heroes

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: A new prisoner in a corporals uniform turns out to be a general with a mission for Hogan

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale Molly and The 73 Crew must practice some trickery to keep Binghamton at bay while they arrange for an against-the-rules wedding for Christy and his fiancee - Lieutenant Gloria Winters

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Urulu puts a curse on Binghamton when Binghamton refuses to arrange for monetary compensation for damages inflicted on Urulus island by the Navys cannon boats

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer and his fellow Marines are headed into town on day passes when one of them is stuck on guard duty Gomer volunteers to help his buddys wife take care of things for the baby - but Sgt Carter volunteers to drive them around leaving his date on hold

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While hitching a ride to town Gomer stops to help a stranded motorist she takes him into town to meet her mother A robber is holding up liquor stores while wearing a Marines uniform at the same time

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professor makes a dye marker to help get rescued The Skipper plans to join the Navy when they get home but he finds out he must lose weight to meet their requirements--and Gilligan finds out that he must gain weight too

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professor makes a dye marker to help get rescued The Skipper plans to join the Navy when they get home but he finds out he must lose weight to meet their requirements--and Gilligan finds out that he must gain weight too

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The entire family begins to pamper Grampa - much to his displeasure

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Luke fears that he may be losing his hair Grandpa employs an unusual tactic to remind Luke that appearances arent as important as he thinks

programme.title: Smart 408
programme.desc: Smart 408

programme.title: Smart 510
programme.desc: Smart 510

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The college students who hire BJ to haul equipment for a talent show secretly plan to his rig as a gambling casino

programme.title: Baywath Nights
programme.desc: Investigating strange events at a nearby campsite Mitch and Ryan enter a cabin and find themselves transported back in time to a 1890s brothel in New York with an axknife wielding killer planning to murder everyone involved

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Matt almost gets run down by a posse of graffiti-packing gangsters he sets into motion a plan of revenge against Lyndah

programme.title: OPReEpisode
programme.desc: When Matt almost gets run down by a posse of graffiti-packing gangsters he sets into motion a plan of revenge against Lyndah

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: The Hitman
programme.desc: A Cop goes undercover as a Hitman to bring down a criminal organization

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A sickly stranger claiming to be Tressas long-lost brother appears at the Langford house

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim befriends a little girl with volatile behavior

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: When a ship carrying a prisoner lands at Moonbase Alpha after asking for assistance Maya insists that the prisoner is a poet and not a murderer and releases him

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: A man claiming to be the Dukes cousin from England Gaylord Duke asks Uncle Jesse for a 30000 advance to pay off the taxes for a piece of land he claims to have inherited But theres more to Gaylords story that he isnt exactly telling

programme.title: Hercules 207
programme.desc: Hercules 207

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A college friend of Renees resurfaces and leads them on an investigation of the link between the Taelons and a biomedical facilitys cloning operation

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Many centuries ago one alien ship crashed on earth The surviving aliens were defeated by a local Indian tribe The modern day aliens attempt to acquire the ship to assist in their subjugation of the planet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a series of burglaries that are taking place during the day and the victims are those with a recent wedding or death in the family A senior citizen uses the paper to find homes that are empty during the day

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An ex-con who places an ad in a newspaper gets a reply referring to making a killing for 1000 He turns the reply over to Friday and Gannon who investigate the possibility that the replier is soliciting murder

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After injuring his ankle while running from the police Kimble winds up in the care of a natural medicine practitioner Kimble believes another patient of his is seriously ill but is unsure how to save her

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A new couples soon-to-be opened general store is invaded by criminals to be used for a tunnel to rob the Barkleys of their gold and the couples husband is apparently involved

programme.title: American Guerrilla In The Philippines

programme.title: Hell Boats

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Revenge of the Dragon
programme.desc: Action star Ramon Zamora stars in this action packed golden oldie A cruel twist of fate turns a peaceful man into a one man death force as he embarks on a violent vengeance trial

programme.title: Cannonball
programme.desc: Racing across the country from LA to New York a plethora of exotic cars carry contestants hoping to win a very large sum

programme.title: Ator the Fighting Eagle
programme.desc: The son of Torren learns of his heritage goes to avenge the deaths of his fellow villagers and rescue his sister from the evil Dakkar and his spider cult

programme.title: Bail Out
programme.desc: A sleazy bail bondsman thinks he has finally gotten his big break when a millionaire heiress gets busted with drug dealers If she shows up in court it could mean a million dollars to him If she doesnt he could be ruined When the deal gets too complicated he hires a playboy bounty hunter to keep an eye on his investment But who is going to keep an eye on him

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Mike Davis at HK49.

programme.desc: Coach Dan Miller puts his wealth of experience and knowledge into helping fighters train properly and get ready to step into the cage the right way. He considers it a gift to be able to help Jess Elverum's MMA career.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 46 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating amateur matchup of Jiu Jitsu athlete Colton Boxell vs. Boxer Mac Laursen. This is followed by the very entertaining pro contest between the ever explosive Vyron Phillips taking on BJJ Black Belt Leo Xavier.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 47 kicks off with with a Featherweight Title Fight in the Amateur Division as striker Joe ""Flash"" Mapanda challenges the reigning champion Justin Basra. This is followed by an Amateur Lightweight Title Fight as Tom ""The Greek Warrior"" Theocharis takes on Alex Martinez. Wrapping up this episode is a pro bout between wrestler TJ Laramie and Luke Noel. You do not want to miss it!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Amanda Buckner v. Julie Kedzie

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.desc: Meet one of the original members of the hit group The 5th Dimension The lovely Ms Florence La Rue stops by the show

programme.desc: My family has osterized me for being queer Meet the African princess whose gender preferences has cost her her family

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss enlists the aid of the Life Eater to be rid of Jayce but the job must be done by the Life Eaters conditions he causes his subjects to face their worst fears and if they weaken even for a moment their life force is trapped forever

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League visits a planet which harbours the greatest computer ever built hoping its terminals hold information on Audrics whereabouts The computer Logos keeps switching Audric back and forth between helping and fighting Jayce

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: In 1878 Jesse James robbed a gold shipment from Wells Fargo and hid it somewhere in Carlsbad Caverns New Mexico VENOM has discovered the clues leading them to the treasure but MASK is hot on their heels
